title: AIOps Observability Store Record
description: Schema for a single record in the AIOps Observability Store per GADS §3.2

record_id.description: UUID v4 unique identifier for this record

source_discipline.description: GOS discipline identifier that produced this record (e.g. SecOps, FinGov)

source_component.description: Specific system or service within the discipline that produced this record

collection_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC microsecond — when AIOps received this record

event_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC microsecond — when the event actually occurred

content.description: Domain-specific structured payload. Schema varies by domain and record_type.

provenance_hash.description: SHA-3-256 hex of the content field

provenance_verified.description: Whether the provenance_signature has been verified by AIOps

epistemic_region.description: Epistemic Field region assignment per GADS §5

dispute_reason.description: If epistemic_region is disputed: the reason for dispute

anomaly_score.description: Standard deviations from domain baseline (0 = no deviation)

synthetic_detection_flags.description: Synthetic observation detection methods that flagged this record per GADS §4.4

gc_component_contribution.description: GC component(s) this record contributes to

instrument_id.description: GMF MIR instrument identifier if this record feeds a specific instrument

retention_days.description: Number of days to retain in Observability Store per GADS §3.2
